data.name: RefereesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referees from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a data of competition from the repository.

data.name: MissingEntitiesError
data.value: One or more Library entities are missing.

data.name: RefereeLevelsLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee levels from the repository.

data.name: RefereeJobTitlesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee job titles from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionsStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a competition statuses from the repository.

data.name: DetailedCompetitionStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a competition statuses and names from the repository.
